violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the dishwashing area was blocked by several items (prep table and food containers). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Items were moved at the time of inspection to allow for easy access to the hand sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

At the time of inspection, Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and knives) that per the PIC were clean were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Utensils/equipment were taken out of service and moved to the 3-bay sink for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

At the time of inspection, bean sprouts and leafy greens were observed held out on the counter at 63 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC instructed to keep bean sprouts and leafy greens in refrigeration between uses. Bean sprouts and leafy greens were moved to refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

At the time of inspection, a bowl was observed being used as a scoop and handles of scoops were observed touching food in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoops were adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

At the time of inspection, "clean" utensils were observed stored in a dirty container. Clean/Sanitized utensils and equipment are to be stored in a way using other means that afford protection from contamination until used. Utensils and storage bucket were brought to 3-bay sink for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The hand sink nearest the front service area was in need of repair/adjustment (splash guards were observed loosely held on with tape). Splash guards are to be installed in a way to provide durability and ease of cleanability. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
